title: Input Reading, Tokenization, Command Registry, and Dispatch · Go Semantics Case: Pokedex Go Command Registry
summary: The loop assumes every read succeeds, splits arguments inconsistently, indexes missing tokens, hard-codes a growing switch, and cannot test dispatch without real stdin and stdout. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source.
